inventory_reconciliation.notes: P2 and P4 are currently devoid of identifiable plant matter, showing only soil and debris.

plant_audit.p1: String of Nickels: Stable, low-light adapted, minimal growth.
plant_audit.p3: Pothos: Single leaf remains, showing signs of chlorosis and potential senescence.

biome_observations.soil_condition: Consistently dark, appears damp with some surface crusting.
biome_observations.debris: White perlite/vermiculite visible; no fungal blooms detected.
biome_observations.desk_surface: Clean, no significant organic matter accumulation.

temporal_deltas.earliest_to_t4: Initial observation shows a yellowing leaf in P3 and a single green sprout in P4/P2 area.
temporal_deltas.t4_to_t2: Progressive decline in P3 leaf turgor; P4/P2 sprout appears to have withered or collapsed.
temporal_deltas.t2_to_current: Final state shows complete loss of the P4/P2 sprout; P3 leaf remains in a state of terminal decline.

anomalies: Presence of a single, isolated green sprout in the lower pot (P4/P2) that failed to thrive and disappeared by the current timestamp.
vision_report.narrative_description: The biome is experiencing a significant decline. While the String of Nickels (P1) maintains a baseline of health, the Pothos (P3) is suffering from severe physiological stress, evidenced by the yellowing and loss of structural integrity of its remaining foliage. The specimens in the lower black pot (P2/P4) have suffered a total systemic loss, with the initial sprout failing to establish and eventually vanishing from the visual record. The environment appears to be suffering from either over-saturation or insufficient light-driven metabolic support.
